stemHtml: In the cruise the flight crew accidently changes the active navigation database to the standby database. What is the main threat that may arise from such action?

options.a: The only threat is the computed airport approaches, however, the flight crew can refer to the paper approach charts always present onboard the aircraft.
options.b: The aircraft may continue flying along an incorrect flight plan route leading to a loss of separation with other traffic.
options.c: Nothing, it is impossible to change the navigation database in flight.
options.d: The main threat is related to the loss of magnetic variation.
